scripts.dev:executor: cd services/executor && npx tsx watch src/server.ts
scripts.test:e2e:all: npm run test:e2e && npm run test:e2e:js && npm run test:e2e:cpp && npm run test:e2e:c
scripts.test:solutions: cd tests/solutions && for f in test_*.py; do python3 "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.db:push: cd apps/web && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:seed: cd apps/web && npx prisma db seed
scripts.db:reset: cd apps/web && npx prisma db push --force-reset && npx prisma db seed
